raw_consumer_statement: IXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX my identity was stolen. At that time I had a Barclays Jet Blue credit card and 3 other Barclay cards were opened in my name. When I noticed it I reported it to Barclays. They immediately closed all of my accounts. I have spoken to the Barclays fraud department 4 times and was told they are working on it and I would receive a letter in the mail within 10 business days I never received anything from Barclays. Barclays has since reported me to the credit bureaus which has adversely effected my credit score. There is still an outstanding balance of {$1500.00} which is accruing late fees and interest. I don not know what else I can do as Barclays is simply providing me with lip service. I spoke with Barclays today and went through the same drill as I did in my previous calls. I tell them about what happened, have to give them the fraudulent charges, am told they will send me a letter in 10 days. last 4 digits of card is XXXX agent number spoken to XXXX XXXX XXXX
